title: Waiting
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'waiting'?
Do you like waiting for things?
Is waiting good for us?
What does waiting teach us?
What's the most important thing you've waited for?
What do you think of people who cannot wait?
What do you do or think about while waiting at the dentist?
What do we call people who cannot wait?
Do you ever give up waiting for people who are late? How long can you wait?
Paulo Coelho said: "Life was always a matter of waiting for the right moment to act." How true is this?
What do you think of people who cannot wait in line?
What are you waiting for now?
Where is a really bad place to wait?
Are people who are waiting for things to happen wishing their life away?
Are you waiting for answers?
Do you like waiting in the rain?
What do you do and think about when you wait for an airplane / aeroplane?
Does your country often have to wait for rain?
Is it easier to wait for things as we get older?
Someone once said: "All god things are worth waiting for." How true is this?
